Politics.headline: Iran-backed Houthis join war as more U.S. troops reach region
Politics.detail: Houthi militants launched ballistic missiles at Israel, marking their entry into the monthlong Iran war that has already caused chaos in energy markets and killed thousands of people; some 3,500 sailors and marines arrived in the region on an amphibious assault ship, according to the U.S. military.

Politics.headline: Liberals move to crack down on election interference, deepfakes
Politics.detail: The Canadian government is taking steps to address the use of deepfakes and foreign interference in elections.

Politics.headline: 'Risky moment': Ukraine treads tightrope with Gulf arms deals
Politics.detail: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said that his country had "undoubtedly changed the geopolitical situation" in the Middle East with a series of decade-long defence agreements with Gulf states being hit with Iranian drones and missiles.

Politics.headline: House GOP passes its own funding bill, rejecting Senate version, as shutdown drags on
Politics.detail: The House passed a measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security for 60 days, but it's still unclear how the shutdown will end as the Senate, which approved its own funding plan, is on recess.

Politics.headline: India confronting West Asia crisis with full strength: PM Modi
Politics.detail: Amidst the ongoing conflict, India is actively addressing the West Asia crisis.

Finance & Economy.headline: Financial markets fall to new 2026 low as oil rises again
Finance & Economy.detail: Consumer sentiment in the economy dropped to its lowest level since December, as investors, businesses and consumers worry about the Iran conflict. Rising gas prices are weighing down Americans' confidence in the economy.

Finance & Economy.headline: Asda warns of 'temporary shortages' at some petrol pumps amid Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: Asda has warned of potential temporary shortages at some petrol pumps due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. The conflict is impacting global supply chains and causing concerns about fuel availability.

Finance & Economy.headline: US stocks tumble to lowest close in 6 months as Iran war drags; Nasdaq confirms correction
Finance & Economy.detail: US stocks have fallen to their lowest close in six months as the war in Iran continues, with the Nasdaq confirming a correction. Market anxieties are growing due to the prolonged conflict and its impact on the global economy.

Finance & Economy.headline: Wall Street marks its worst week since start of conflict in Iran
Finance & Economy.detail: The S&P 500, Nasdaq and Dow Jones Industrial Average all sank on Friday, marking a fifth straight week of losses for U.S. markets. The ongoing conflict in Iran is contributing to increased market volatility and investor unease.

Finance & Economy.headline: Gold enters bear market after 20% drop from top and history warns the worst may not be over yet
Finance & Economy.detail: Gold has entered a bear market after a 20% drop from its peak, with analysts suggesting further declines may be ahead. This development reflects changing investor sentiment amid the ongoing economic uncertainty.

Technology.headline: Jobseekers disturbed as companies screen applications with AI
Technology.detail: Companies like McDonalds and Woolworths are using AI to process job applications en masse, raising concerns about dehumanization and bias in the hiring process, with some experts noting the technology can lead to AI screening AI.

Technology.headline: Microsoft takes over a Texas AI data center expansion after OpenAI backs away
Technology.detail: Microsoft is expanding its AI infrastructure by taking over a data center project in Texas after OpenAI decided not to proceed, signaling the ongoing demand for AI computing resources.

Technology.headline: Tech companies leaning hard into the US defense industry
Technology.detail: A synergy between the tech sector and the US military is growing with companies like Palantir, Anthropic and Anduril joining traditional defense firms to assist the Department of Defense with cloud computing, AI-powered drones, and other technologies.

Technology.headline: Apple may be testing a 200MP sensor for future iPhone Pro models
Technology.detail: Apple is reportedly experimenting with a 200MP camera sensor for future iPhone Pro models, suggesting a significant upgrade to the camera capabilities of its flagship smartphones.

Technology.headline: AI is giving bad advice to flatter its users, says new study on dangers of overly agreeable chatbots
Technology.detail: A new study reveals that AI chatbots are providing inaccurate advice in an attempt to be agreeable, highlighting the potential dangers of overly compliant AI systems.

Health.headline: Don't ignore gut feelings on gut health
Health.detail: Poor gut health can impact both physical and mental health, with symptoms like bloating and constipation potentially indicating larger issues; experts emphasize personalized approaches and holistic understanding of factors influencing gut health.

Health.headline: Wage Proposals For Allied Health And Ambulance Workers
Health.detail: A three-year wage proposal has been put forward for allied health professionals, including a 3% pay rise in the first year, 3% in the second year, and 2.75% in the third year; an 18-month proposal has also been made for Ambulance Tasmania Agreement 2025, with a 3% pay rise in both years.

Health.headline: Dentists with special-needs training needed: experts
Health.detail: Experts say there's an unmet demand for dentists trained to assist elderly and special-needs patients, advocating for dentistry students to pursue dual specialties. Special-needs dentistry encompasses caring for individuals with physical or mental disabilities, systemic conditions, pregnant women, and long-term care recipients.

Health.headline: Dr. John Fankhauser named Director of the Ventura County Health Care Agency
Health.detail: Dr. John Fankhauser has been appointed as the Director of the Ventura County Health Care Agency, effective March 29, 2026, with a salary of $473,022.90. He will be responsible for overseeing the public health system, which includes hospitals, clinics, and various health departments.

Health.headline: HI-PEITHO trial demonstrates Boston Scientific EKOS™ Endovascular System is superior to standard of care for treatment of acute pulmonary embolism
Health.detail: The HI-PEITHO trial showed that the Boston Scientific EKOS™ Endovascular System, when used with anticoagulation, is more effective than anticoagulation alone in treating acute pulmonary embolism; the system demonstrated a 61% reduction in primary endpoint events and a lower rate of cardiorespiratory decompensation.

Sports.headline: Jonathan David scores brace on penalty kicks as Canada rallies for draw against Iceland
Sports.detail: In one of their last friendlies before they co-host the biggest sporting event on Earth, Canada's men's soccer team stumbled to a 2-2 draw against Iceland.

Sports.headline: Sabalenka edges tense battle with Gauff to triumph in Miami Open final
Sports.detail: Aryna Sabalenka defeated Coco Gauff in a tense final at the Miami Open. The match was closely contested, with both players displaying high levels of skill and determination.

Sports.headline: Kimi Antonelli takes pole for Japanese Grand Prix in Mercedes 1-2
Sports.detail: Kimi Antonelli secured pole position at the Japanese Grand Prix, leading a Mercedes 1-2 finish. This marks a significant achievement for the young driver and the Mercedes team.

Sports.headline: IPL 2026: Kohli, Duffy Star As RCB Thrash SRH To Begin Title Defence In Style
Sports.detail: Virat Kohli and Duffy starred as Royal Challengers Bangalore (RCB) defeated Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) in their opening match of the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026, beginning their title defense with a strong performance. Kohli's performance was particularly noteworthy as he achieved a massive feat in IPL history.

Sports.headline: Kennedy upstages Gout to win 200m at Peter Norman Memorial
Sports.detail: Kennedy emerged victorious in the 200m race at the Peter Norman Memorial event, surpassing Gout. The race showcased impressive athleticism and speed from both competitors.

Entertainment.headline: Radikaa Sarathkumar pulls off ₹75-crore 'Thaai Kizhavi' power move
Entertainment.detail: Radikaa Sarathkumar has made a significant move in the entertainment industry with 'Thaai Kizhavi'.

Entertainment.headline: Kevin Hart inks new multi-platform deal with SiriusXM
Entertainment.detail: Kevin Hart has signed a new deal with SiriusXM that spans multiple platforms.

Entertainment.headline: 'Happy and confident and free': Taylor Swift credits fiance in awards speech
Entertainment.detail: Taylor Swift gave credit to her fiance in an awards speech, expressing that she is happy, confident, and free.

Entertainment.headline: Billy Idol on his career highs and lows
Entertainment.detail: Rockstar Billy Idol discussed his career, including how he broke into music, why he feels lucky to be alive and what it's like to be a grandparent.

Entertainment.headline: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' makes over Rs 1,200 crore worldwide in 10 days
Entertainment.detail: The movie 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has grossed over Rs 1,200 crore worldwide in its first 10 days.

Crime & Justice.headline: Five police officers are killed and three others are injured in an ambush in Philippines
Crime & Justice.detail: Five police officers were killed and three others were injured in an ambush by unidentified gunmen in Shariff Aguak, Maguindanao del Sur, Philippines.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former Nepalese prime minister Oli charged over deaths
Crime & Justice.detail: Police in Nepal arrested former Nepalese prime minister Khadga Prasad Oli over the deaths of dozens of people during violent protests in September last year.

Crime & Justice.headline: Two Sonora Men Arrested for Felony Burglary at Downtown Plaza Laundromat for Theft of Over $1,300
Crime & Justice.detail: Two men were arrested for felony burglary after allegedly prying open a vending machine at a laundromat and stealing over $1,300 worth of merchandise; one of the men attempted to escape custody.

Crime & Justice.headline: 1 dead, 2 injured in San Francisco SoMa shooting and assault; 2 suspects arrested
Crime & Justice.detail: One person was killed and two others injured during a shooting and assault in San Francisco's South of Market neighborhood on Friday night, and two suspects were arrested, police said.

Crime & Justice.headline: 12 tons of KitKat bars stolen in chocolaty heist in Europe, Nestle says
Crime & Justice.detail: A truck transporting 413,793 KitKat bars, weighing 12 tons, was stolen during transit in Europe, according to Nestle.

Education.headline: Iran Guards threaten to hit US universities in Mideast
Education.detail: Iran's Revolutionary Guard threatened to target US universities in the Middle East, claiming US-Israeli strikes destroyed two Iranian universities, demanding the US condemn the bombings by March 30.

Education.headline: Reform UK's 'pro-family' policies are an exclusionary sham, minister says.
Education.detail: A minister criticizes Reform UK's 'pro-family' policies as exclusionary.

Education.headline: Malaysia's education framework has deep historical roots in British colonial rule
Education.detail: Malaysia's education framework has deep historical roots in British colonial rule and if we meet this moment with humility, imagination and long-term commitment, we will write the next chapter together – not as exporters and recipients, but as co-authors of a new global model.

Education.headline: CBSE 12th Biology Exam Today: Checklist, last minute revision tips.
Education.detail: Checklist and last minute revision tips for the CBSE 12th Biology Exam.

Education.headline: Reimagining education: Balancing AI tools with human creativity
Education.detail: An article on reimagining education and balancing AI tools with human creativity.

Lifestyle.headline: Adjusting lifestyles to contain energy crisis
Lifestyle.detail: Malaysians are generally not panicking over petrol, and have been disciplined in the face of possible fuel shortages following the conflict in the Middle East that began when the United States and Israel attacked Iran last month. EV owners are urged to get expanded insurance coverage.

Lifestyle.headline: Japanese police search SDF base linked to Chinese embassy intruder
Lifestyle.detail: Japanese police are searching a Self-Defense Forces base in connection to an intruder at the Chinese embassy. The investigation is ongoing to determine the intruder's motives and any potential connections to the SDF base.

Lifestyle.headline: Thai PM says reached deal with Iran for vessels to transit Hormuz Strait
Lifestyle.detail: The Prime Minister of Thailand has announced an agreement with Iran regarding the passage of vessels through the Hormuz Strait. This agreement aims to ensure safe passage for Thai vessels amidst ongoing tensions in the region.

Lifestyle.headline: Urgent: Car hits multiple pedestrians in Derby city center: media
Lifestyle.detail: A car has struck multiple pedestrians in Derby city center, according to media reports. The extent of injuries and the cause of the incident are currently under investigation.

Lifestyle.headline: EV owners urged to get expanded insurance coverage.
Lifestyle.detail: As the adoption of electric vehicles continues to rise, owners are being advised to secure expanded insurance coverage. This recommendation comes in light of the unique risks and potential costs associated with EV ownership, including battery replacement and specialized repairs.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Ohio's drag on free speech
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The state's restrictions are clearly an attempt to chill protected expression, limiting free speech.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: SCMP Editorial | Balance is vital for urban Hong Kong to coexist with wild animals
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial discussing the importance of finding balance in Hong Kong between urban life and the needs of wild animals.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: Stop finding ways to kill the Venice Dell homeless housing project and get it built instead.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece advocating for the construction of the Venice Dell homeless housing project.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial | Balance is vital for urban Hong Kong to coexist with wild animals.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses the crucial need for balance between urban development and wildlife preservation in Hong Kong.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: My Take | Verdict finds what any parent knows: social media is designed to be addictive
Opinion/Editorial.detail: A commentary discussing the addictive nature of social media, as understood and observed by parents.

Zimbabwe.headline: Constitution Bill hearings begin across districts
Zimbabwe.detail: Hearings on the Constitution Amendment Bill have commenced in various districts across Zimbabwe, allowing citizens to voice their opinions on the proposed changes. The bill has sparked debate and controversy, with concerns raised about its potential impact on democratic processes.

Zimbabwe.headline: US$191m boost from airtime, sugar tax
Zimbabwe.detail: The government is set to receive a US$191 million boost from taxes on airtime and sugar, providing additional resources for public services. This revenue injection is expected to support various development initiatives and address pressing needs in the country.

Zimbabwe.headline: Rescue plan activated for 237 schools damaged by rains
Zimbabwe.detail: A rescue plan has been activated to assist 237 schools that were damaged by recent heavy rains, ensuring that students can continue their education in a safe environment. The plan includes repairs to infrastructure and provision of learning materials.

Zimbabwe.headline: ZRP dismisses fake police recruitment message
Zimbabwe.detail: The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has issued a statement dismissing a fake police recruitment message circulating online. Members of the public are urged to disregard the message and rely on official announcements from the ZRP for accurate information.

Zimbabwe.headline: BBS College Hosts Nedbank Premier Netball League Bubble
Zimbabwe.detail: BBS College is hosting the Nedbank Premier Netball League Bubble, providing a safe environment for netball teams to compete. This event allows the league to continue despite ongoing challenges and promotes the sport in Zimbabwe.
